data.title: Nidec shares deemed Security on Special Alert by Tokyo Stock Exchange on Oct 28, 2025, for internal management issues.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, on October 28, 2025, the Tokyo Stock Exchange labeled the Company's shares as Security on Special Alert due to issues in the internal management system. The designation was made after determining the urgent need for improvement. The Tokyo Stock Exchange, Inc. took this action based on their assessment of the Company's operations. The Company received the Security on Special Alert status on the same date in 2025. The announcement was part of the "Notice Regarding Designation of Security on Special Alert by Tokyo Stock Exchange."
Navient releases Q4 2025 financial results.

data.title: Nidec sets up "Culture Transformation Lab" for fundamental change effective February 01, 2026.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, Nidec Corporation (TOKYO: 6594; OTC US: NJDCY) has introduced the Culture Transformation Lab (the “Lab”) as part of its commitment to fundamental cultural transformation, starting from February 01, 2026. The Lab was established under the Nidec Corporate Reform Committee, tasked with developing and implementing measures to enhance operations and prevent future issues.

data.title: LoanWorks, Inc. is first mortgage broker to integrate AngelAi into its platform, revolutionizing AI-powered lending.
data.description: LoanWorks, Inc. based in San Diego made a notable announcement on Jan. 28, 2026, revealing their status as the pioneering mortgage broker to implement AngelAi seamlessly into their primary operating system at the fundamental workflow stage. This move is a major achievement in the advancement of AI-driven lending practices.

data.title: Lennox reports Q4 revenue of $1.2B, down 11%, operating income $196M, segment profit down 16%, EPS $4.07.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of the fiscal year, with comparisons to the previous year unless specified otherwise due to a change in accounting method, revenue decreased by 11% to $1.2 billion. GAAP operating income was $196 million, showing a 16% decrease in segment profit to $212 million. GAAP diluted earnings per share were $4.07.

data.title: Southwest Airlines to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Jan. 29, 2026 at 10 AM ET. Bob Jordan to discuss.
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has announced a live webcast of its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. The webcast featuring Bob Jordan, the President and Chief, is scheduled for Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. This event presents an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance during the specified periods.

data.title: Marine Products Corp (NYSE: MPX) declares $0.14/share regular quarterly cash dividend, payable on Mar 10, 2026.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Marine Products Corporation (NYSE: MPX) disclosed that a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share has been declared by its Board of Directors. This dividend is set to be paid on March 10, 2026, to common stockholders recorded as of the close of business on February 10, 2026.

data.title: Global Labor Market Conference in Riyadh concludes with 90 agreements aiding 6 million+. King Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud oversees.
data.description: Today, in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Global Labor Market Conference (GLMC) 2026 wrapped up its proceedings at the King Abdul Aziz International Conference Center. The conference, held under the patronage of Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques King Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, gathered participants from around the world to discuss pertinent labor market issues. Key figures, including global leaders, experts, and policymakers, attended this significant event.

data.title: Modular Construction Market to reach $142.87 billion by 2030 per MarketsandMarkets report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on January 28, 2026, data from MarketsandMarkets reveals insights into the Modular Construction Market. This market is segmented by Type into Permanent and Relocatable, and by Material including Wood, Steel, and Concrete. The Module and End-use Industry breakdown includes Residential, Office, Educational, Hospitality, Healthcare, and Retail & Commercial sectors. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable information for stakeholders involved in the market.

data.title: Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN) to reduce workforce by 10% in operational efficiency plan. HOD HASHARON, Israel, Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Valens Semiconductor, a prominent player in high-performance connectivity based in Hod Hasharon, Israel, revealed its operational efficiency strategy, aiming to enhance overall performance. As part of this plan, the company intends to reduce its workforce by 10% across different departments. This decision comes as the company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VLN, seeks to optimize its operations and streamline its resources.

data.title: Blue Apron named top weekly meal kit by Consumer365 for its flexibility, variety, and quality-driven meals in 2026.
data.description: A top weekly meal kit service, Blue Apron, has been acknowledged by Consumer365 for its excellence in offering flexibility, menu variety, and quality-driven meal solutions. The recognition is a reflection of changing consumer preferences in the meal kit industry.

data.description: Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) stated today that they will participate in the Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. Patrick Watson, Vice President, will represent the company at the event.

data.title: Options Technology introduces 1st commercial quantum compute platform in New York City for capital markets. #Finance #QuantumComputing
data.description: Options Technology, a prominent financial services infrastructure provider, unveiled the debut of the first commercially available quantum computing capability in New York City. This offering is part of their hybrid compute platform accessible worldwide. The evolution of capital markets has led to companies being more limited by their capacity to simulate, optimize, and manage risks rather than data availability. The quantum computing capability is set to revolutionize financial services in major cities like London, Toronto, New York, and Hong Kong.

data.title: AT&T reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 financial performance, with revenues of $33.5 billion in Q4 and $125.6 billion in the full year. Adjusted EBITDA was $11.2 billion in Q4 and $46.4 billion for the full year. Customer convergence rate grew to 42% for AT&T Fiber households. AT&T expects to return over $45 billion to shareholders from 2026-2028, amid a focus on providing advanced connectivity services through investments in 5G and fiber. Advanced connectivity service revenue is expected to grow in the mid-single-digit range annually.
data.description: AT&T reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, meeting or exceeding financial guidance, with revenues of $33.5 billion and $125.6 billion for the respective periods. The company returned over $12 billion to shareholders in 2025 and plans to return over $45 billion from 2026-2028. They achieved solid customer satisfaction scores and significant subscriber growth, with 421,000 postpaid phone net adds in Q4 and 1.5 million for the full year. Operating income for Q4 was $5.8 billion, while adjusted EBITDA was $11.2 billion. The company expects to improve growth in adjusted EBITDA and EPS through 2028 and return $45 billion+ to shareholders from 2026-2028. They anticipate service revenue and EBITDA growth, maintaining a dividend of $1.11 per share annually and reducing net leverage to around 3x by late 2026.AT&T plans to focus on delivering converged advanced connectivity services across 5G and fiber and anticipates significant growth in the Advanced Connectivity segment. Postpaid phone net adds were 1,157 in Q4, and the company expects Legacy service revenue to decline by over 20% in 2026 as it shifts focus to advanced connectivity services. The long-term plan includes returning $45 billion+ to shareholders, maintaining dividends, maintaining a net debt-to-adjusted EBITDA ratio of around 3x by the end of 2026, and focusing on improved growth in adjusted EBITDA and EPS through 2028.
